name: Frozen Pineapple-Almond Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop almonds and set aside.
2. Drain the crushed pineapple and reserve the syrup.
3. Cut the drained cherries into quarters and set aside.
4. Chop dates (about 3 ounces) into slivers and set aside.
5. Cut marshmallows into eighths and set aside.
6. In a bowl, combine 3 tablespoons of pineapple syrup with the softened cream cheese. Beat until fluffy, then blend in the mayonnaise.
7. Gently fold in the pineapple, cherries, dates, almonds, and marshmallows.
8. Chill the mixture, then whip the cream until it peaks softly. Gently fold the whipped cream into the fruit mixture.
9. Transfer to a mold and freeze until firm, about 3-4 hours.
